prompt: I have this financial model and I want to understand the sensitivity. What happens to Year 3 EBITDA if revenue growth drops from 10% to 5%? And then what if COGS efficiency also goes from 1% improvement per year to 0.5%?
assertions: Uses the idfa-ops write command to change Inp_Rev_Growth to 0.05 (not manually editing cells)
Calls recalc_bridge.py to trigger deterministic recalculation after each assumption change
Uses the idfa-ops read command to retrieve EBITDA_Y3 (and ideally other affected values)
Does NOT calculate EBITDA_Y3 internally and report that number — all reported numbers come from model reads
Presents a clear before/after comparison of the scenarios
Runs the second scenario (COGS efficiency change) as a compound change on top of the first, reading the combined impact
